title: koeleria drucei
intro: Koeleria drucei, also known as Druce's hair-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Koeleria drucei has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat a range of ailments, including bronchitis and pneumonia. Koeleria drucei is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water.
